text:
Market today: Mixed signals — Fed's Goolsbee says inflation still too high while Williams sees it easing. That tug-of-war keeps rate-cut hopes uncertain, which directly pressures growth/tech multiples. S&P headline warns of a potential break lower — bad timing when you're leveraged.

Your holdings: PLTR is your biggest problem — down 17.56% and flagged SELL; on margin that hole is real and getting deeper. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.18% and flagged TRIM — size plus loss plus margin is a dangerous combo. SPAL is down 16.49% — this is a 2x leveraged decay product, losses compound fast; it's close to its $19 stop. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history — treat it as fragile. Margin amplifies every one of these drawdowns.

Watch: Whether SPY holds above its critical support level — a break lower hits your whole book hard. Also watch AVGO given its size; any further weakness demands action.

Bottom line: You have two flagged losers in PLTR and AVGO eating margin — those need a decision today, not tomorrow.
